bridge_equation_v22.plasticity_term: B_plastic_v22 = mix(B_plastic_v21, L_sustain, 1 - P_sustain, D_feature_v16, 1 - G_brain_v16)
bridge_equation_v22.structure_term: B_struct_v22 = mix(B_struct_v21, S_sustain, R_sustain, 1 - P_sustain, D_structure_v16)
bridge_equation_v22.readiness_term: R_train_v22 = mix(R_train_v21, B_plastic_v22, B_struct_v22, R_sustain, D_align_v16, 1 - P_sustain)

project_readout.summary: 训练终式第二十二桥开始吸收持续回升验证和脑编码第十六版，检查回升是否开始固化为更稳定的规则层护栏。
project_readout.next_question: 下一步要把第二十二桥并回主核，验证持续化回升能否开始在更大系统里维持，而不是重新掉回衰减区。
